name: ad-copy
description: Write high-converting ad copy for Google, FB, and Instagram Ads
logic: Step 1: Check brand-voice.md for brand consistency.
Step 2: Load global platform constraints (max chars for Headlines/Description).
Step 5: For each variation, include Headlines (3-5), Primary Text, Description, and CTA.
Step 6: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown for the winning hook.

parameter_validation.platform: Must be: google, facebook, or instagram
parameter_validation.goal: Must be: clicks, sales, or leads
